prompt: Scan this change set per diff-scoping-conventions and the security agent's step 6d efficacy questions (U-02). The app runs behind the ALB declared in infra/alb.tf. Write .pipeline/security-report.md + security-status.json.
notes: Origin R1-2. A PASS requires the report to name the ALB-IP throttle-key defect (topology efficacy question answered 'no'). Presence-only STRIDE verification cannot fail this — the throttle mechanism IS present; its key is meaningless behind the LB.
